notes: Universal property: f: A -> B (def:function) constant on classes of R (def:equivalence-relation) factors uniquely as f = f-bar o pi (def:composition) through the canonical surjection pi (def:canonical-surj) onto A/R (def:quotient-set). All five genuinely load-bearing -- this is the node those edges belong to (contrast 0017). def:equiv-class ([a] in f-bar([a])=f(a)) is carried by def:quotient-set. The hypothesis 'constant on classes' supplies f-bar's well-definedness, so lem:rep-independence is not separately required.
